zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Anne MacMartin於1392年出生在英國蘇格蘭希倫德萊特分萊時，她的父親Lester Martin of Letterfinlay22歲，母親Jean Barclay21歲。她於1423年與Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾享年80歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Anne MacMartin于1392年出生在英国苏格兰希倫德萊特分萊时，她的父亲Lester Martin of Letterfinlay22岁，母亲Jean Barclay21岁。她于1423年与Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾享年80岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacMartin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Mairtin ‘son of Martin’. Compare Gilmartin .

variants.name: Gilmartin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Brendan, Declan, Dermot, Niall.
Scottish and Irish (Sligo and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Mhartain, a patronymic from the personal name Giolla Mhartain ‘servant of (Saint) Martin’ (see Martin ).

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Anne MacMartin was born in 1392, in Letterfinlay, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Lester Martin of Letterfinlay, was 22 and her mother, Jean Barclay, was 21. She married Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron in 1423, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1472, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Anne MacMartin est née en 1392, à Letterfinlay, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lester Martin of Letterfinlay, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Jean Barclay, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron en 1423, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1472, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Anne MacMartin 1392 in Letterfinlay, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lester Martin of Letterfinlay 22 und ihre Mutter Jean Barclay 21. Sie hat 1423 in Scotland Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1472 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Anne MacMartin è nata il nel 1392 nel Letterfinlay, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lester Martin of Letterfinlay, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Jean Barclay, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron nel 1423, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1472, nel Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Anne MacMartinが1392年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドレッテルフィンレイで生まれた時，父Lester Martin of Letterfinlayは22歳，母Jean Barclayは21歳であった。1423年にスコットランドでDonald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで80歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Anne MacMartin(이)가 1392년 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 레터핀레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lester Martin of Letterfinlay(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean Barclay(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1423년 스컷랜드에서 Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Anne MacMartin nasceu em 1392, em Letterfinlay, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lester Martin of Letterfinlay, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Jean Barclay, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron em 1423, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1472, em Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Anne MacMartin родилась в 1392 г. в местности леттирфинлеи, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lester Martin of Letterfinlay было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jean Barclay, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron в 1423 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1472 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie Anne MacMartin nació en 1392, en Letterfinlay, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Lester Martin of Letterfinlay, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Jean Barclay, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron en 1423, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1472, en Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Inverness-shire, Scotland.
